procedures.name: Open cholecystectomy with peritoneal washout
procedures.facility: Greater Baltimore Medical Center — Main OR
procedures.notes: Urgent open cholecystectomy for perforated gangrenous gallbladder with localized biliary peritonitis. Estimated blood loss minimal. No intraoperative complications. Intraoperative bile culture: pansensitive E. coli. Recent major intra-abdominal surgery — relevant to bleeding-risk timing of any subsequent therapeutic anticoagulation.

procedures.name: CT abdomen/pelvis with IV contrast
procedures.facility: Greater Baltimore Medical Center — Emergency Radiology
procedures.notes: Diagnostic imaging that established perforated cholecystitis with peritonitis (see imaging IMG001).
